// <auto-generated>This file has been auto generated from 'Qyl.OpenTelemetry.SemanticConventions.SourceGeneration'.</auto-generated>

#nullable enable

#pragma warning disable CS1570 // XML comment has badly formed XML

namespace OpenTelemetry.SemanticConventions;

/// <summary>
/// Typed setter extensions for OpenTelemetry semantic-convention attributes on a span.
/// Each method invokes <c>global::System.Diagnostics.Activity.SetTag</c> with the
/// registry-defined key and a strongly-typed value.
/// </summary>
static partial class HttpActivityExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `client.address` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by client.address.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpClientIp(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.client_ip", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `network.protocol.name` and `network.protocol.version` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Split into `network.protocol.name` and `network.protocol.version`")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpFlavor(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.flavor", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use one of `server.address`, `client.address` or `http.request.header.host` instead, depending on the usage.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by one of `server.address`, `client.address` or `http.request.header.host`, depending on the usage. ")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpHost(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.host", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `http.request.method` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by http.request.method.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpMethod(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.method", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// HTTP request headers, `<key>` being the normalized HTTP Header name (lowercase), the value being the header values.
    /// 
    /// </summary>
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpRequestHeader(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string segment,
        string[] value)
        => activity.SetTag($"http.request.header.{segment}", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// HTTP request method.
    /// </summary>
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpRequestMethod(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.request.method", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Original HTTP method sent by the client in the request line.
    /// </summary>
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpRequestMethodOriginal(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.request.method_original", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// The ordinal number of request resending attempt (for any reason, including redirects).
    /// 
    /// </summary>
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpRequestResendCount(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        long value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.request.resend_count", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `http.request.header.content-length` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by `http.request.header.content-length`.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpRequestContentLength(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        long value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.request_content_length", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `http.request.body.size` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by http.request.body.size.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpRequestContentLengthUncompressed(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        long value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.request_content_length_uncompressed", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// HTTP response headers, `<key>` being the normalized HTTP Header name (lowercase), the value being the header values.
    /// 
    /// </summary>
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpResponseHeader(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string segment,
        string[] value)
        => activity.SetTag($"http.response.header.{segment}", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// [HTTP response status code](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6).
    /// </summary>
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpResponseStatusCode(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        long value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.response.status_code", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `http.response.header.content-length` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by `http.response.header.content-length`.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpResponseContentLength(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        long value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.response_content_length", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `http.response.body.size` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by http.response.body.size.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpResponseContentLengthUncompressed(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        long value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.response_content_length_uncompressed", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// The matched route template for the request. This MUST be low-cardinality and include all static path segments, with dynamic path segments represented with placeholders.
    /// 
    /// </summary>
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpRoute(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.route", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `url.scheme` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by url.scheme.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpScheme(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.scheme", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `server.address` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by server.address.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpServerName(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.server_name", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `http.response.status_code` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by http.response.status_code.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpStatusCode(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        long value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.status_code", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `url.path` and `url.query` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Removed, no replacement.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpTarget(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.target", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `url.full` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by url.full.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpUrl(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.url", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `user_agent.original` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Replaced by user_agent.original.")]
    public static global::System.Diagnostics.Activity SetHttpUserAgent(
        this global::System.Diagnostics.Activity activity,
        string value)
        => activity.SetTag("http.user_agent", value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Deprecated, use `network.protocol.name` and `network.protocol.version` instead.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.Obsolete("Split into `network.protocol.name` and `network.protocol.version`")]
    public static class HttpFlavorValues
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// HTTP/1.0
        /// </summary>
        public const string Http10 = "1.0";

        /// <summary>
        /// HTTP/1.1
        /// </summary>
        public const string Http11 = "1.1";

        /// <summary>
        /// HTTP/2
        /// </summary>
        public const string Http20 = "2.0";

        /// <summary>
        /// HTTP/3
        /// </summary>
        public const string Http30 = "3.0";

        /// <summary>
        /// SPDY protocol.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Spdy = "SPDY";

        /// <summary>
        /// QUIC protocol.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Quic = "QUIC";
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// HTTP request method.
    /// </summary>
    public static class HttpRequestMethodValues
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// CONNECT method.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Connect = "CONNECT";

        /// <summary>
        /// DELETE method.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Delete = "DELETE";

        /// <summary>
        /// GET method.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Get = "GET";

        /// <summary>
        /// HEAD method.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Head = "HEAD";

        /// <summary>
        /// OPTIONS method.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Options = "OPTIONS";

        /// <summary>
        /// PATCH method.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Patch = "PATCH";

        /// <summary>
        /// POST method.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Post = "POST";

        /// <summary>
        /// PUT method.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Put = "PUT";

        /// <summary>
        /// TRACE method.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Trace = "TRACE";

        /// <summary>
        /// Any HTTP method that the instrumentation has no prior knowledge of.
        /// </summary>
        public const string Other = "_OTHER";
    }
}
